hero.headline: Navigate safely when GPS is disrupted
hero.subheadline: TrueRoute fuses OBD2 speed, gyroscope, and GPS into one accurate position — and keeps going when GPS fails.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1Body: Plug any ELM327 Bluetooth adapter into your car's OBD2 port — no tools needed.
howItWorks.step2Body: OBD2 speed + gyroscope + GPS are combined into one continuous, accurate position.
howItWorks.step3Body: When GPS is jammed or spoofed, dead reckoning keeps your position accurate automatically.

features.title: What TrueRoute does
features.gpsDetectionDesc: Identifies GPS spoofing and jamming in real time.
features.deadReckoningDesc: Continues navigation from OBD2 speed and phone sensors when GPS is lost.
features.offlineMapsDesc: Download regional maps once, navigate without internet.
features.gpxImportDesc: Load any GPX track to follow your planned route offline.
features.diagnosticsDesc: Live OBD2 data: speed, RPM, and engine codes.

requirements.title: What you need
requirements.adapter: ELM327 Bluetooth OBD2 adapter (~$10, Bluetooth Classic / SPP)
requirements.noHardware: Any special hardware beyond the adapter

seo.homeTitle: TrueRoute — GPS Spoofing Protection for Ukrainian Drivers
seo.homeDesc: Navigate safely when GPS is disrupted. TrueRoute detects GPS spoofing and switches to dead reckoning using your OBD2 adapter and phone sensors.
